Auth.tagline: A little help to care better.
Auth.loginDescription: Keep track of the moments that matter.
Auth.registerDescription: Start with the basics. You can adjust everything later.
Auth.genericError: Something went wrong. Please try again.

Profile.title: You're all set
Profile.description: Your account is connected and ready.
Profile.sessionInvalid: Your session has expired. Please sign in again.

Onboarding.title: When did the most recent period start?
Onboarding.description: Choose the first day of the most recent period. This helps bebo estimate when the next cycle may begin.
Onboarding.dateHint: You can update this date later.
Onboarding.privacy: Predictions are estimates and may change over time.
Onboarding.genericError: We couldn't save this date. Please try again.

Dashboard.description: A simple view of the next estimated cycle.
Dashboard.daysUntil: {count, plural, =0 {Expected today} one {# day remaining} other {# days remaining}}
Dashboard.daysPast: {count, plural, one {Estimate passed # day ago} other {Estimate passed # days ago}}
Dashboard.basedOnHistory: {count, plural, one {Based on # recent cycle} other {Based on # recent cycles}}
Dashboard.addPeriodDescription: Choose the first day of the period.
Dashboard.loadError: We couldn't load your cycle data.
Dashboard.editPeriodDescription: Update the first day of this period.
Dashboard.deleteConfirmDescription: This date will be removed and your cycle prediction will be recalculated. This action cannot be undone.
